title: Pramita Sen joins Nirka Law Advisory as Partner to Business & Strategy Group
description: Pramita Sen has joined Nirka Law Advisory (NLA) as a Partner to lead the firm's Business & Strategy Group and spearhead its next phase of growth and market expansion.Sen has over 15 years of experience in practice development, strategic growth, brand positioning, and professional services management. Prior to joining Nirka Law Advisory, she founded and led WeYou Partners, a consulting platform focused on creating growth opportunities, market visibility, and business expansion strategies for
